stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Amsterdam chart 10-3C from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
Which of the following statements correctly describes the RNAV SID ANDIK 2F?

options.a: Turn to track 040° after waypoint EHØ2Ø.
options.b: Turn before EHØ2Ø to heading 054° and proceed to intercept radial 015° from PAM VOR.
options.c: Turn before EHØ2Ø to track 054° and proceed towards the next point in the FMS (EHØ43).
options.d: Turn to track 040° before reaching EHØ2Ø.
